title: Joca's Tech Stack
description: Tech and AI vocabulary for real jobs: deploy, ship, scale, API, PR, onboarding, standup. The English every Brazilian dev needs for a US remote job.
summary_pt_br: Vocabulário de tech + IA em inglês profissional: deploy, ship, scale, rollback, PR, code review, standup, onboarding, retro, OKRs. Focado em brasileiros indo para trabalhos remotos em startups dos EUA. Inclui expressões cotidianas do Slack corporativo.

scenes.subtitle_pt: Inglês de tech, versão do mundo real

scenes.text_en:
Joca opened Slack. The channel was alive.
'Morning team — let's CIRCLE BACK on the feature we SHIPPED yesterday.'
'My PR is in review. Quick EYES from anyone?'
'Standup in 5.'
'We need to ROLL BACK that deploy — it SPIKED error rates.'
Joca took notes. Six new idioms before breakfast.
scenes.text_pt:
O Joca abriu o Slack. O canal estava fervendo.
'Bom dia, time — vamos REVISITAR a feature que FOI LANÇADA ontem.'
'Meu PR está em revisão. Alguém dá um OLHAR RÁPIDO?'
'Standup em 5.'
'Temos que REVERTER aquele deploy — disparou a taxa de erro.'
Joca anotou tudo. Seis expressões novas antes do café.

items.pt: reunião diária de 15 min do time
reunião de 'o que funcionou / o que não'

scenes.title: Phrasal verbs that rule tech Slack
scenes.body_en: CIRCLE BACK = return to a topic later. PING someone = send a quick message. LOOP IN = include in the conversation. KICK OFF = start formally. WRAP UP = finish. TOUCH BASE = align briefly. These five appear in almost every remote-work conversation.
scenes.body_pt: Cinco phrasal verbs onipresentes no Slack: circle back (voltar ao tema), ping (avisar rapidinho), loop in (incluir alguém na conversa), kick off (começar oficialmente), wrap up (finalizar).

examples.en: I'll loop Zara in on this thread.
examples.pt: Vou incluir a Zara nessa conversa.

examples.en: Can we kick off the call?
examples.pt: A gente pode começar a call?

exercise.question: 'We need to ___ the deploy — the site is down.' Which?
exercise.explanation: ROLL BACK = revert to the previous version. Critical phrase in a production incident.
exercise.hint_pt_br: ROLL BACK = reverter. Jargão obrigatório em incidentes de produção.

exercise.question: Complete: 'Could you ___ me ___ on the billing thread?' (incluir)
exercise.explanation: LOOP someone IN = include them in the conversation. 'Loop me in on X'.
exercise.hint_pt_br: 'Loop me in' = me inclui nessa conversa. Uso diário em Slack.

exercise.explanation: Five nouns that appear every day. Learn them as full phrases: 'the PR is blocked', 'we did a retro'.
exercise.hint_pt_br: Cinco substantivos diários. Aprenda em frases, não isolados.

turns.en: Quick heads-up: we're rolling back the 3pm deploy. Error rate spiked.
turns.pt: Aviso rápido: estamos revertendo o deploy das 15h. Taxa de erro subiu.

turns.en: Loop me in on the retro. I'd like to take a look at the root cause.
turns.pt: Me inclui na retro. Quero ver a causa raiz.

turns.en: Will do. I'll kick off the incident doc.
turns.pt: Tá combinado. Vou começar o documento de incidente.

exercise.question: Your manager says 'Do you have bandwidth for this?' What do they mean?
options: Do you have time/capacity to take it on?
exercise.explanation: BANDWIDTH = time and energy to take on more work. A euphemism to avoid sounding pushy.
exercise.hint_pt_br: BANDWIDTH = capacidade/tempo. Nada a ver com internet, tudo a ver com carga de trabalho.
